programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While Mac and Jack are tracking a dangerous fugitive, a family of bounty hunters kidnap him; Bozer and Riley try to hack into Jack's CIA file.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When Mac and the team are blamed for a terrorist bombing, the Phoenix Foundation is forced to disavow them; the team must clear their names without support from back home.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After an earthquake in Hawaii, Mac and the team join Chin and Kono from the Five-0 task force to rescue a group of government scientists trapped in a building; another group tries to steal top-secret weaponry from the scientists.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mac's close friend from M.I.T. fakes her own death to prevent someone from killing her to suppress her scientific research.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When the team intercepts a terror group's message for Murdoc, instructing him to kill a tech analyst, Mac poses as a psychopath to save the intended victim.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Murdoc moves ahead with his plans for revenge against MacGyver by recruiting his recently released former cellmate to infiltrate the Phoenix Complex and kill every agent inside.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver uses a cell phone and soccer ball in the search for a Navy SEAL who is believed to be held captive in the Middle East.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Riley disappears during her first solo mission; Mac and the team attempt to locate her.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: An ex-con and his adopted brother go on the run with a weapon of mysterious origin as their only protection.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: A crew of astronauts set off for a new planet—a journey that descends into chaos.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: An ex-con and his adopted brother go on the run with a weapon of mysterious origin as their only protection.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: 99 Homes [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over their bodies and erasing their memories.

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a homesteading family's life when they are attacked by a ruthless gang.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: Places In The Heart
programme.desc: In depression America, hardship was everywhere, survival was a struggle, and hope was hidden in places in the heart.

programme.title: Memoirs Of A Geisha
programme.desc: A Cinderella story set in a mysterious and exotic world, this stunning romantic epic shows how a house servant blossoms, against all odds, to become the most captivating geisha of her day.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: In this action packed thriller, an assassin teams with a female counterfeiter to prevent a hit that he was supposed to commit. THE REPLACEMENT KILLERS stars Oscar winner Mira Sorvino, International action star, Chow Yun Fan (in his U.S. debut), Michael Rooker and Jurgen Prochnow.

programme.title: 30 Minutes Or Less
programme.desc: In the action-comedy 30 Minutes or Less, Nick (Jesse Eisenberg) is a small town pizza delivery guy whose mundane life collides with the big plans of two wanna-be criminal masterminds (Danny McBride and Nick Swardson). The volatile duo kidnaps Nick and forces him to rob a bank. With mere hours to pull off the impossible task, Nick enlists the help of his ex-best friend, Chet (Aziz Ansari). As the clock ticks, the two must deal with the police, hired assassins, flamethrowers, and their own tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Walk, Don't Run
programme.desc: A middle-aged electronics expert in Tokyo during the Olympics, is forced to share an apartment with a young woman since his hotel suite will not be available for two days.

programme.title: Forbidden
programme.desc: An affair with a small-town librarian threatens the career of an up-and-coming politician.

programme.title: Hook, Line And Sinker
programme.desc: Thinking he's dying, a poor schnook goes on a $100,000 spending spree only to find out he's as healthy as a horse.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: A landmark road film, EASY RIDER chronicles the search for freedom by two motorcycle-riding drifters (Peter Fonda and Dennis Hopper) who meet up with alcoholic lawyer, Jack Nicholson in a southern jail. Nicholson gets them out and then joins them on their liberating journey.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: A daughter brings her fiance home to meet her parents, not having told them he s black.

programme.title: Valentine: The Dark Avenger
programme.desc: Srimaya, a waitress at a café, dreams of a glamorous life as an actress. A chance meeting with a film director and his assistant leads to a life-changing series of events for Srimaya, as they take her on a thrilling adventure that finds the waitress-turned-actress transforming into the person Batavia City needs and deserves most: the consummate kick-ass superhero!

programme.title: Hearts Beat Loud
programme.desc: A father and daughter form an unlikely songwriting duo in the summer before she leaves for college.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [Subbed]
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Piranha
programme.desc: When flesh-eating piranhas are accidentally released into a summer resort's rivers, the guests become their next meal.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: A reformed sociopath fights to uncover the truth behind his brother’s death.

programme.title: Traffik
programme.desc: A getaway turns to terror after Brea and John accidentally discover the hidden world of a brutal biker gang.

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, a detective goes to prison to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Blood Out
programme.desc: Michael goes undercover to take justice into his own hands after his brother is murdered by a gang.

programme.title: I Am Vengeance: Retaliation
programme.desc: Ex-special forces soldier John Gold agrees to retrieve a hated foe in exchange for an expunged record.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: The Legend of Tomiris
programme.desc: The life story of Tomiris, the great queen of the steppe, who was destined to become a skillful warrior and unite the Scythian and Saka tribes.

programme.title: Baby Assassins
programme.desc: Two high school girls who are about to graduate also happen to be highly-skilled assassins. When the organization that employs them orders them to share a room, their relationship turns sour.

programme.title: Baby Assassins 2
programme.desc: Chisato and Mahiro must pay four years of overdue fees or lose their membership in their assassin guild. They take part-time jobs, but find themselves in the middle of an armed robbery and being hunted by other assassins.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: A former gang leader battles human traffickers to save her kidnapped daughter.

programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: Mary Stauffer and daughter's harrowing abduction, held for seven weeks.

programme.desc: The rich and famous abusing their privilege to get their kids into college

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Starring Aunjanue Ellis, Keke Palmer, and Sherri Shepherd.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: Carlesha was walking home when she is forced into a car at knifepoint.

programme.title: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: Mary Stauffer and daughter's harrowing abduction, held for seven weeks.

programme.title: A Slice of Romance
programme.desc: PR exec Mikayla strikes a deal with pastry chef Austin to rebrand his café to get dating advice.

programme.title: The Best Version of Love
programme.desc: Image upgrader Rebecca discovers the best version of herself might include stubborn client Clive.

programme.title: Betting on the Bride
programme.desc: A womanizer bets that he can get someone to accept his marriage proposal after just 30 days of dating. What he doesn't know is that the woman he targets has serious commitment issues.

programme.title: Get Out Alive
programme.desc: An estranged couple on a retreat have to put aside their problems to survive their targetting by criminals.

programme.title: Hunt for Truth
programme.desc: Carrie Evans uncovers unsettling truths about her family and boss Caswell Foxx while researching a major case.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Thick Trip
programme.desc: Four close-knit friends, all single and yearning for a change, embark on a summer-long 'Queen's Trip' to South Padre, Houston, and the untouched wilderness. As they travel and experience the vibrant cultures and breathtaking landscapes, they confront their fears, rediscover their passions, and explore their own wild sides.

programme.title: Queens of Dope City
programme.desc: Joselyn, Kendra and Alicia are partners in a rideshare service they have created together, but are struggling financially to maintain the business. One day Joselyn gives a man named Donte a ride who presents her with an opportunity to keep the business going. Things then begin to spiral out of control when they soon are chased down from the law, and must escape Donte.

programme.title: He Killed My Sister
programme.desc: When Malorie's sister, Monica, disappears, everyone around her tells her to grieve and move on. Determined to bring her justice, Malorie embarks on a search for the truth. But when she meets Tyriq, his motives may not be as pure as they seem.

programme.title: Bloodline Secrets
programme.desc: Thirty-three-year-old Keisha is engaged to be married to the man of her dreams, Joseph. Joseph believes he’s ready for marriage with the love of his life but his best friend, John, has his doubts about Keisha’s faithfulness. When family secrets come out of the shadows, it puts their marriage and lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Double Standards 2
programme.desc: When Pastor Noble Jonez’s carefully constructed image begins to unravel, his wife Trezjiir is forced to confront not only the trauma of her past but the deceit poisoning her present. As buried secrets resurface—ranging from infidelity, hidden paternity, abuse of power, and criminal ties—every lie brings them closer to destruction.

programme.title: Love and Deceit 2
programme.desc: Carolyn, a successful businesswoman moves to a new town in hopes of laying down some roots after her divorce. She joins a local women’s group ran by Beverly Jordan a respected therapist to help process her emotions. When in reality, she’s there to rekindle an old flame with a former lover, who happens to be Beverly’s husband.

programme.title: Asteroid Vs Earth
programme.desc: When meteors threaten Earth's extinction, its greatest minds devise a plan to tilt the planet off its axis.

programme.title: Triassic World
programme.desc: Dinosaurs used to grow human organs for transplants escape. The scientists that created them must fight back.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Our Heroes find two distinct Native American tribes trying to survive in two separate ways.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln vs Zombies
programme.desc: As the Civil War rages, President Lincoln undertakes a more daunting task: Destroying the Confederate Undead.

programme.title: 6 Guns
programme.desc: After a woman’s family is slaughtered, she hires a gunslinger to teach her how to shoot to take vengeance.

programme.title: Ape x Mecha Ape: New World Order
programme.desc: Mankind's last hope rests on Abraham and Mecha Ape MkII to defeat a new enemy.

programme.title: Maniac Cop 2
programme.desc: The Maniac Cop is back from the dead and stalking the streets of New York once more. Officer Matt Cordell was once a hero, but after being framed by corrupt superiors and brutally assaulted in prison, he sets out on a macabre mission of vengeance, teaming up with a vicious serial killer to track down those that wronged him and make them pay... with their lives!

programme.title: Terror Train 980)
programme.desc: A nightmare journey to hell begins when a group of college students play a cruel prank on their resident nerd which contributes to sending him insane. Cut to several years later and the same group hold a New Years Eve fancy dress party aboard a privately chartered train, the only problem, they are joined by an uninvited guest.

programme.title: Bloodsucking Bastards (Edited Version)
programme.desc: When an office worker at a soul-crushing company loses a promotion to his longtime nemesis, he begins to fear for more than his job as strange disappearances and bizarre deaths suggest the office is turning into a haven for the undead.

programme.title: Ice Cream Man (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Poor Gregory. After being released from the Wishing Well Sanatorium, all he wants to do is make the children happy. So Gregory reopens the old ice cream factory, and all the unappreciative brats are reprocessed into the flavor of the day.

programme.title: Hatchet II: Unrated (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Victor Crowley lives in this follow-up to Adams Greens Hatchet. The quiet but hot-tempered heroine Marybeth (Danielle Harris, Halloween) barely escapes from the clutches of the mysterious Crowley (Kane Hodder, Friday The 13th), who has already has murdered all of Marybeths friends and other vacationers in the New Orleans swamp country. Marybeth recruits a team of hired guns and returns to the bayou to exact her revenge, but quickly discovers that even with an army of hunters at her side, the murderous fury of Crowley cannot be contained. Ultimately, it will be up to Marybeth alone to defeat the seemingly indestructible Crowley, but not before learning the truth about a twisted secret he shares with her own family!Filled with buckets of giddily over-the-top blood 'n' guts (The Hollywood Reporter), not to mention a funky, frisky sense of humor (The Onion AV Club), the unrated Hatchet II serves up a ferocious and furious dose of splatterific entertainment.just like in old days!

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After a long winter trapped in the ice, scouting parties are sent out in search of open water. One of the teams makes a frightening discovery.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With something now stalking the ships, the captains debate their options, testing their loyalty to one another against their duty to their crews.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A cunning attack on the ships proves the men are not battling an ordinary bear and that the region's Inuit culture may hold a key to their survival.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A strange illness begins to show itself while another more familiar one jeopardizes the expedition's most valuable resource - its captain's judgment.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With the end of their provisions in sight, officers contemplate an 800-mile walkout while planning a party to raise the men's worsening spirits.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Mountain Men
programme.desc: A pair of grizzled frontiersmen and trappers search for a legendary valley rumored to be full of beaver.

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: Tex Ritter stars in this western drama about a man who goes undercover to befriend a convict believed to have stolen a shipment of government gold. Also starring Guy Wilkerson as Panhandle Perkins, this offering from Hollywoods Poverty Row features the usual fistfights and entertaining storyline that made these modestly budgeted features well worth watching. Songs include Teach Me To Forget and You Will Have to Pay both sung by Tex!

programme.title: Shine on Harvest Moon
programme.desc: Jackson and his gang are cattle rustlers holed up in Jackson Hole Wyoming. Roy's partner Brower was once Jackson's partner and is now suspected of being in cahoots with him. Someone is tipping off Jackson as to the cattle's whereabouts and when Roy learns who it is he has a plan to trap Jackson and clear his partner. Starring Roy Rogers, Lynne Roberts, and Myrtle Wiseman as 'Lulu Belle. Directed by Joseph Kane.

programme.title: McLintock
programme.desc: He likes his whiskey hard... His women soft... And his west all to himself! Inspired by Shakespeares The Taming of the Shrew (1594), John Wayne (The Searchers, Stagecoach), Maureen OHara (Miracle on 34th Street, The Parent Trap), and Patrick Wayne (The Searchers, The Alamo) star in this western comedy directed by Andrew V. McLaglen (Gunsmoke, The Wild Geese). George Washington McLintock (John Wayne) is the wealthiest man in his territory who utilizes his power and influence to maintain order between farmers, ranchers, Indians, corrupt government officials, and his own family! McLintock is McNificent!

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this Republic Pictures western about the final days of the Pony Express. Former rider John Blair (Wayne) enters a coach race to win a $25,000 government mail contract, but there are dozens of obstacles in his path. The rest of the cast includes Lane Chandler and Phyllis Fraser, plus Lew Kelly (Lady of Burlesque) doing a great comic turn as Rocky OBrien, the eccentric, self-proclaimed mayor of a deserted mining town.

programme.title: Doomed Caravan
programme.desc: Hoppy is enlisted to help protect Jane Travers' next caravan against robbers who have been terrorizing travelers. He comes across a wily pair of thieves who hve their men disguised as soldiers to escort the caravan. Hoppy isn't fooled for a second and busts up their plan with help from the Bar 20 boys. Not to be outdone, the thieves then capture everyone but Hoppy and puts them before a firing squad. Not it's up to Hoppy to rescue his friends singlehandedly. The cast includes William Boyd as Hopalong Cassidy, with Russell Hayden and Andy Clyde as Luky Jenkins and California Jack. For those counting, this was the 32nd of 66 Hopalong Cassidy adventures. They would be edited for syndication on television, bringing Hoppy and his friends to a whole new generation of fans.

programme.title: Outpost In Morocco
programme.desc: George Raft, Mary Windsor, and Akim Tamiroff star in this romantic drama from director Robert Florey (The Florentine Dagger, Daughter of Shanghai). Raft plays Capt. Gerard, a member of the Foreign Legion known for his romantic entanglements. He's assigned to escort an emir's daughter to her father's mountain citadel and learn about the emir's activities. Not surprisingly, Gerard finds trouble brewing! With footage shot in Morocco, this movie also features a beautiful musical score by twotime Oscar nominee Michel Michelet (Voice in the Wind).

programme.title: Doc Holliday 2

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: The Monster Jam action intensifies as elite drivers push their trucks to the edge in a high-energy showdown packed with momentum swings and jaw-dropping saves. Racing, skills, and freestyle runs collide as rivalries heat up and the leaderboard stays in constant motion, with massive air, hard landings, and razor-thin margins separating the field. From aggressive charges out of the gate to freestyle moments that bring the crowd to its feet, every run carries championship implications. With no room for mistakes, this episode delivers nonstop Monster Jam spectacle and sets the tone for an unforgettable stretch of competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Duct Tape Forever
programme.desc: When an evil land baron's limo falls into a sinkhole outside Possum Lodge, a judge orders the men to pay $10,000 in damages in 10 days or lose their beloved lodge forever. Lodge leader Red Green considers various money-making schemes the men dream up, like selling road kill on the Internet. But it's Harold, Red's nerdy nephew, who comes up with an idea that just might save their wood-smoked bacon: a duct tape sculpture contest in Minneapolis with a $10,000 third-place prize. Before you can say "go for the bronze," Red and Harold are hitching the Possum van to their can't-fail, low-ball entry and heading for trouble. Will Harold get the credit he craves and the girl he deserves (or vice versa)? Is their goose cooked or will it fly?

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Just in time for National Ravioli Day, acclaimed chef and Chopped judge Scott Conant joins the trio at the W South Beach to make his delicate ricotta gnocchiótechnically gnudióalongside his signature Martone Street jarred tomato sauce. Michael has been close friends with Scott for 15 years, and Clinton admits he was genuinely nervous before meeting the notoriously stern Chopped judge, quickly discovering he's warm and funny in person. Scott explains that Martone Street is named for his grandparents' home in Waterbury, Connecticut, where Sunday dinners taught him that conversation over food is one of life's greatest gifts. The gnocchi dough combines fresh ricotta, basil, breadcrumbs, flour, egg, and Parmesan, shaped into small dumplings and cooked until they float. Scott builds a stabilized butter sauce using pasta water and cornstarch as an emulsifieróa trick that keeps it smooth for hours. Finished with Martone Street sauce and broccoli rabe, the result is stunning in its simplicity. His philosophy runs throughout: spaghetti aglio e olio, done correctly, is one of the most complex and satisfying dishes imaginable. Scott becomes emotional talking about watching his 16-year-old daughter drive for the first time and the joy of steak cook-offs with his girls at home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner and Southern food authority Damaris Phillips brings a taste of Louisville poolside at the W South Beach, demonstrating three Southern tea sandwich classics that are anything but fussy. Carla Hall has been singing Damaris's praises for yearsómutual friend Jackie Guido insisted they were destined to be peas and carrotsóand the episode proves her right, the two radiating warmth and joy throughout. Damaris makes Pimento Cheese; Benedictine, a Louisville specialty of grated cucumber with dill and cream cheese (the key being squeezing out all the cucumber water first); and Ham Salad, essentially chicken salad's porky cousin, versatile as either sweet or savory. Everything is layered on Japanese milk bread or thin white bread, crusts removed, and assembled into dainty finger sandwiches and triple-decker stacks. Michael immediately tries to build an enormous open-face sandwich rather than the delicate bites Damaris intended, sparking a lively debate about proportion and restraint. Carla shares that she recently spent a cozy Super Sunday with Damaris in Louisvilleóa beloved tradition of soups, board games, and community. The episode also features a spirited group effort to talk Damaris out of her plan to get a leopard-print face tattoo, with limited success. The episode ends with genuine laughter, warm hugs, and unanimous agreement: the sandwiches are delicious.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Two-time Tournament of Champions winner and Chopped veteran Maneet Chauhan arrives at the W South Beach as a true Queen of Flavor, demonstrating her Indian Spiced Ceviche, a dish that applies Indian culinary logic to coastal Latin technique. Fresh fish is cured in lime juice in the traditional ceviche manner, then transformed with coconut milk to soften the heat and balance the citrus, and finished with a tarka: the Indian technique of blooming whole spices in searing hot coconut oil and pouring it directly over the dish at the last second. The result is layered, bright, and unexpected. Maneet explains that she grew up in a small town in India and learned to cook by exploring her neighbors' kitchens, each representing a different regional tradition. She recounts a pivotal story from Peru, where she made potato pancakes alongside a local woman without sharing a single word of common languageóconnected entirely through food and gesture. That philosophy runs through her Nashville restaurant, which introduces diners to bold Indian flavors through fusion dishes like hot chicken korma and chicken tikka salad poutine. She draws a parallel between the tarka and the French beurre blancóboth finishing techniques that transform a dish in the final seconds of cooking. Michael, Clinton, and Carla taste the ceviche with genuine surprise and awe.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: As the Chewed Up crew wraps up their week at the W South Beach, Miami-born chef Mika Leon brings the most authentically local dish of the entire trip: Pan Con Lechon, the slow-roasted Cuban pork sandwich that anchors Noche Buena, Cuban Christmas Eve. Mika woke up at 4 AM to start the pork shoulderómarinated overnight in a mojo sauce built on sour orange juice, lime juice, orange juice, and 50 cloves of garlic from her grandfather's recipe. After six hours at 350 degrees, the pork is shredded and crisped with additional mojo in a hot pan, then piled high on a special Cuban rollósweeter and fattier than regular bread, made with lard throughout. Mika shares her journey from dabbling in TV production (she quit after a week) to opening a food truck selling $5 Pan Con Lechons at 3 AM to Miami club-goers, which grew into a full restaurant and now a cookbook. Carla notes that the best cooks often learn from family before any formal training, and this dish proves it. The group discusses Miami's cultural identityómore its own country than a Florida cityódefined by Spanglish, its own traffic logic, and immigrant food traditions passed down for generations. Clinton finally admits that despite a full week at the W, none of them ever made it into the pool.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The South Beach week closes with a live audience tapingóthe most unhinged episode of the tripóas Michael Symon, Carla Hall, and Clinton Kelly perform in front of a crowd of fans. Michael's voice is noticeably shot from a long week of celebrating, so Clinton and Carla carry extra energy while he freestyle hosts from notes he promptly loses within 30 seconds. Carla makes her refreshing Pineapple Lime Agua Fresca: blended fresh pineapple with lime water (lime juice diluted to avoid sharpness), ginger, honey, and wateróa batched mocktail or cocktail mixer that's as beautiful as it is easy. She shares her tip for getting full use of citrus by zesting before juicing. The episode features 'Chew It or Screw It,' a voting game where the audience weighs in on Florida's most adventurous foods: iguana pizza, python sausage, alligator ribs, conch fritters, and fried frog legs. Carla and Clinton report on their spontaneous 7 AM sunrise bike rideótheir first ever togetheróand Clinton jokes about his impossibly pale, non-tanning legs. The trio explores Florida's wildlife peculiarities, from iguanas falling from trees in cold snaps to flying cockroaches given affectionate nicknames. A Chewed Up Challenge heads-up guessing game rounds out the audience interaction with giveaways. Season 3's Miami week ends exactly how it began: loud, funny, and hungry.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon take on the ultimate comfort food by each creating their own version of a grilled cheese sandwich, showcasing three distinct styles that range from classic to elevated. Michael leads with a rich and decadent Croque Madame, complete with a homemade mornay sauce, gruyère, ham, and a perfectly cooked egg on top, sharing tips on building flavor and texture through technique. Carla follows with a Southern-inspired twist, hollowing out a brioche bun to stuff it with pimento cheese and tangy chow chow pickles, emphasizing balance and texture in every bite. Clinton rounds things out with a fan-inspired take on a classic grilled cheese, combining American, cheddar, and gruyère cheeses on rye bread, using mayonnaise for an evenly crisp, golden exterior. Throughout the episode, the trio trades stories, jokes, and cooking insights, debating everything from sandwich ratios to restaurant culture. They later shift into a lively “overrated vs. underrated” game, diving into food trends, brunch culture, and even aging, blending humor with candid reflections. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway and appreciation for sponsors, leaving viewers inspired to experiment with their own grilled cheese creations at home.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon welcome legendary pitmaster Melissa Cookston for a lively, flavor-packed episode centered around Mexican-inspired smoked chicken wings. The conversation kicks off with playful banter about grilling, live-fire cooking, and Melissa’s impressive barbecue credentials, setting the stage for a masterclass in flavor. Melissa walks the hosts through her approach to wings, emphasizing dry rubs over heavy sauces and showcasing a spice blend inspired by her travels to Mexico, featuring garlic, onion, smoked Hungarian paprika, ancho chili powder, cumin, and oregano. Along the way, the group dives into deeper cooking philosophy—trusting your instincts, cooking with your senses, and understanding that great barbecue is about feel as much as technique. Melissa shares insights on smoking temperatures, wood choices, and why over-smoking can ruin a dish, comparing it to over-salting. The energy stays high as Clinton hilariously spirals into wing-induced chaos, while Carla and Michael debate everything from condiments to air fryers. The episode also highlights Melissa’s new cookbook, Fanning the Flames, described as a love letter to her global culinary travels and the people who inspired her. After cooking, the group digs into the wings, followed by a round of “Chew It or Screw It” and fan mail, blending humor with heartfelt moments. The episode wraps with giveaways and a celebration of community, creativity, and the joy of cooking with fire.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this heartfelt Mother’s Day episode of Chewed Up, Michael Symon, Carla Hall, and Clinton Kelly reflect on the women who shaped them while Carla leads the kitchen with a show-stopping mimosa brioche French toast topped with frangipane. Inspired by her mother’s love of simple breakfast classics like pancakes and French toast, Carla elevates the dish into a baked, brunch-worthy centerpiece featuring brioche, apricot jam, almond-rich frangipane, and a champagne-orange glaze. As the dish comes together, the hosts share nostalgic stories about their childhoods—from weeknight dinners and Sunday sauces to special outings at places like Bob Evans and Chinese restaurants—highlighting how food connects to family memories. The conversation flows with humor and warmth, touching on generational differences in cooking habits and dining culture. Once the dish is baked to golden perfection, the trio digs in, praising its rich texture and balance of flavors, with Carla’s creative twist winning everyone over. The episode continues with playful segments like “What Would Mom Say,” where the hosts share funny and revealing lessons from their mothers, followed by fan mail and a casual food discussion. The show wraps with a giveaway of Carla’s personal artwork and a sincere tribute to moms everywhere, celebrating the love, lessons, and meals that define family traditions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes on a true first in his cooking career by attempting homemade corn dogs without any prior test run, bringing a mix of nerves and excitement to the kitchen as Michael Symon and Carla Hall cheer him on. Inspired by a popular recipe from Natasha’s Kitchen, Clinton walks through the batter and frying process in real time, navigating hot oil, technique adjustments, and plenty of playful banter. As the trio discusses their favorite fair foods—from funnel cake to childhood carnival memories—the conversation veers into hilarious territory, including rollercoaster mishaps and food-related regrets. Despite the pressure, Clinton successfully executes the corn dogs, achieving a golden, airy batter that impresses both Carla and Michael. The tasting confirms the dish as a win, with praise for its balanced sweetness, texture, and classic flavor. The episode also features a “Fan of the Day” segment, celebrating Charlene from New York with a personalized shoutout, along with a quick fan mail discussion about music preferences while cooking, revealing everything from Judy Garland to Metallica and R.E.M. The episode wraps on a high note, with Clinton’s confidence restored, the group celebrating a successful first attempt, and the hosts encouraging viewers to engage, subscribe, and bring the fun into their own kitchens.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a vibrant frozen pea soup in under 20 minutes—sautéed onions, stock, mint, parsley, white pepper, and cream blended silky smooth—then leads the hosts in Peep Roulette, a blind flavor-guessing game. Clinton wins; Michael is traumatized.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this “Munch Madness” episode of Chewed Up, Carla Hall, Clinton Kelly, and Michael Symon put eight frozen pizzas through a bracket-style taste test inspired by March Madness. The hosts compare each pairing, breaking down crust, sauce, cheese, and overall flavor while mixing in humor, nostalgia, and brutally honest reactions. As they move through the rounds, the conversation is fueled by strong opinions, unexpected preferences, and plenty of debate about what actually makes a good pizza. Michael’s love of authentic pizza drives passionate critiques, Clinton reflects on his long hiatus from frozen options, and Carla keeps things grounded in everyday practicality for busy households. The competition builds toward a final showdown that sparks lively discussion and a few surprising takes. The episode then shifts into a conversation about potlucks, outdoor dining, and picnics, blending personal preferences with playful arguments. It wraps with a fan giveaway and the hosts’ signature banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly welcomes Stacy London for a fun, nostalgic episode focused on creative ways to use leftover hard-boiled eggs. Stacy makes her signature deviled eggs with a creamy filling and bold toppings like chorizo and jalapeño, while Clinton shares a simple asparagus mimosa finished with grated eggs and vinaigrette. Along the way, the hosts swap stories, talk fashion, and play games, bringing humor and energy to an episode that blends easy recipes with playful conversation.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Dinner with Tyler Huggins" - Our guest this week is Tyler Huggins, founder and CEO of Meati. Dave has prepared a worldwide tour of bar foods that includes “pizza okonomiyaki,” hwe dup bap, galbijjim, and Korean army stew.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Chicken-Bacon-Ranch “Larb”: Andrew prepares a dish from Dinner Time Live that is a testament to ranch dressing. More specifically, a testament to the holy trinity of chicken, bacon, and ranch. This riff on larb is full of flavor and meat. "Riff” because larb is the national dish of Laos — as well as a very popular dish in northern Thailand — and this is by no means an authentic larb. But… is it delicious? Yeah, it is.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - The 'Mu Shu Denver' and Plum Upside Down Cake: Chris and Andrew (with the help of Andrew's daughter) put together the breakfast crowd-pleaser 'Mu Shu Denver,' an inspired concoction of all the best breakfast foods from the New York Diner episode of Dinner Time Live; Andrew makes the Plum Upside Down Cake from the Summer Menu episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Oyakodon & Mortadella Sandwich: Chris Ying cooks a Japanese dish called Oyakodon that he made for his buddy David Chang on a recent episode of Dinner Time Live. Oyakodon translates to “parent and child bowl” and refers to the main ingredients: chicken (the parent) and egg (the child). Chicken thighs and sliced onions are simmered in seasoned dashi, then covered in egg, which forms a custard-y blanket to be served over rice. Chris and Andrew make a Dinner Time Live recipe based on one of David Chang's favorite sandwiches in the world: a cheesy, hot, mortadella sandwich. This version has a twist—a Chinese steamed bun as a tribute to Momofuku's famous pork buns.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind The Counter With Dave Chang: The Spring Menu - An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a Springtime inspired menu for guests Maya Rudolph and Ron Funchess. Dishes include: pea and mint soup, truffled egg toast, crab cakes with warmed artichoke and ramp salad, and roast lamb chops with spätzle and braised morels.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Dave's Comfort Foods: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Choose Your Own Adventure Menu: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Ying Cooks the Internet
programme.desc: "A Complete Christmas Roast Beef Dinner" - The internet is full of people advertising their recipes for affordable! simple! budget-buster! Christmas dinners. But just because you want to save some money and not break your back making dinner doesn't mean you don't want something festive and celebratory. Chris Ying is here to light the way to a full Christmas dinner—roast beef, horseradish cream, creamed spinach, baked potatoes, Yorkshire pudding—for under $50. Nothing hacky or gimmick-y about it. Just a good old-fashioned heart-warming holiday dinner from Colonel Christmas himself.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia believes in cooking according to season, and when springtime comes, she and her family all work together to create a beautiful garden. In this episode, she shares four recipes that celebrate the bounty of the summertime garden: Tuna Salad with Boiled Zucchini, String Bean Salad with Capers and Basil, Whole Wheat Couscous with Cucumbers, and finally Shells with Chicken and Zucchini.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Today, Lidia serves a beautiful Striped Bass with Tomato Pesto over a bed of fennel as the star of the meal. She then creates a tasty dish of Mint String Beans. For dessert, summer is still the theme with Peach Granita, although the granita technique can be made with all kinds of seasonal fruits.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates a Tomato and Mint Salad, Tomato and Ricotta Crostini, and Spaghetti with Quick Pantry Sauce, before finishing with a Gluttonous Tomato - a perfect appetizer or lunch dish.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing better than a great piece of meat! In today's episode, Lidia takes a less expensive cut, London Broil, and marinates it to perfection. Her menu includes a delicious Vegetable Patty served with green salad which works as an appetizer or by itself as a quick lunch; London Broil with Sundried Tomato Marinade and one of her Grandma Rosa's favorites, Corn and Walnut Cake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about fresh seafood in this episode with three of Lidia's most requested fish recipes: Clam Bruschetta features crusty Italian bread, still warm from the grill with clam sauce; Halibut Baked with Mushrooms in a Lemon and White Wine Sauce is a great weeknight meal as is Grouper with Potatoes and Peppers.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia creates a seasonal meal that says 'Family Time'. Pork and grapes are a natural combination, and in today's menu she prepares Pork Medallions with Grapes; Baked Fennel with Sage and for dessert, a colorful and perfect cold weather Orange in Marsala for dessert.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Are you always in a rush to prepare something quick yet delicious for dinnertime? Lidia shares three of her favorite quick and simple meal ideas, all of which can work as an appetizer, a lunch or a quick dinner. They include: Scallops, Scallion and Mushrooms; Chicken Breasts with Orange and Gaeta Olives; Tuna with Mimosa Sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Garlic and Onions appear in many Italian dishes, and in this episode they actually become the "star ingredients." Lidia starts the meal with a quick and easy Savory Onion Tart followed by a delicious, mild and creamy Garlic Risotto. For dessert, it's all about chocolate with the moist Torta Caprese.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing more delicious than butterflied poultry with super crispy chicken. In this episode, Lidia starts with a Spicy Butterflied Cornish Hen made with hot cherry peppers, rosemary and wine. She then pulls out the beer to add to her Potatoes Baked in Beer. Our favorite Grandma Erminia joins Lidia to taste the Squash and Ricotta Tart.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about family in this episode as Lidia shares three of her favorite family recipes. Marinated Meatballs, Zucchini Parmigiana, Artichoke Carbonara and Jam Filled Mezzaluna are the stars of this episode.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing like a warm oven that makes guests feel invited in a kitchen. The heat and the aromas permeate and bring smiles to everyone's faces. In this episode, Lidia shares three of her favorite oven baked dishes - Eggplant and Rice Parmigiana, Vegetable and Meat Casserole, and Bread Pudding with Pears.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: There is nothing like pasta to bring Lidia's family to the table. In this episode, Lidia shares some of her favorite pasta dishes including a comforting Baked Rigatoni with Zucchini, a delicious Penne with Ricotta and Mushrooms and one of her personal favorites, Fettuccine with a Clam and Leek Sauce.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: It's another episode dedicated to simplicity and delicious ingredients. Here Lidia chooses three great dishes that can be made in very little time but offer great flavors and complexity. They are great as appetizers, sides or by themselves and include Caprese Salad with Celery and Walnuts, Stuffed Artichoke with Tuna and Scallop Salad.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Everybody loves pasta! In this episode, Lidia starts with the simplest - a Spaghettini with Olive oil and Rosemary, then moves on to a hearty dish of Tagliatelle with Meatballs and Eggplant, and finishes with a delicious whole wheat pasta- Baked Whole Wheat Penne with Ceci Beans.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates Ötzi the Iceman’s last meal (c. 3,359–3,105 BC), discovered in 1991. He covers Ötzi’s clothing, tools, health (tattoos, heart disease, parasites), and likely murder by arrow. Using stomach contents—smoked ibex, charred red deer, and einkorn pancake with fiddle ferns—Max cooks over an open fire to mimic Neolithic methods.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: John worked with professional van builders to create his high tech sprinter van conversion, equipped with a tiltable solar array, lithium batteries and everything he needs to be a digital nomad and travel in northern Canada. He gives us a tour through his tiny home on wheels and shares what Vanlife means to him.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Amazing DIY camper build with beautiful interior woodwork. This 1988 GMC Vandura went from being an old camper to a tiny house that feels nice and cozy inside like a cabin on wheels. This couple has made this small space their home for over two years.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Storm lives full-time in his DIY Astro Minivan while attending university full-time in one of Canada's most expensive cities. He believes this is a good option for students to save money by not having to pay for rent and using the facilities at school to make van living easier.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Meg and Molly, along with their two cats and one dog, live full-time in a van tiny house that they built from a Montreal fire department utility truck. They have been traveling North America for the past two years. Meg built the van out herself with some help for the solar and plumbing.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Dani tours us around and through his amazing DIY Minivan build that he lives in full time. He spent many hours on this passion project with the idea that the build process should be fun. This van has a full electrical system, a bed and unique storage systems.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Frank and his cat Sunny live in this lifted converted 1998 Chevy Express van. Frank has renovated the build multiple times to fit different needs, and now it is built out to fit just him and his cat. He built it as a 4 seasons camper capable of going off road to explore the less touristy places, with R-14 rockwool insulation, a diesel heater, listed suspension, and upgraded tires.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Jo bought a van to live in and use as a bedroom instead of paying rent in Canada's most expensive city. After finding some roof and window leaks during the winter, she decided to invest some money into renovation and repairing this classic camper van. She used creativity and kept her expenses low while still providing the amenities that she needed.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Madison and Ray are professional van upfitters who have lived in this sprinter van for years. It's built out with a battery bank to a large 700AH system of Battle born lithium batteries, 360w of solar, a 12 volt air conditioner that can run off-grid on their battery system, and a Latte machine cupboard that slides out.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Jason and Kenna live full time on their sailboat which is a Cheoy Lee offshore 41, and they give me a tour around this amazing boat. Jason has been sailing for years and has outfitted sailboats for off shore sailing from BC Canada to Hawaii, and Mexico, but this is what he calls his forever boat. Kenna grew up in the Canadian prairies and never sailed until she met Jason in Victoria BC.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: In this Van tour, James shows us his DIY custom-built mini van camper that he built using recycled materials. He built it as a bug out van and as his fortress of solitude to work on writing short stories. Even though it's only a minivan, he was able to pack in a kitchen, power system, AC unit, and everything else he needs.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Van tour of a custom built DIY camper conversion in a Dodge Promaster van. This Vanlife couple built their Vanlife dream van over 3 months of hard work. Rob, having worked in the confined space of a train for years, wanted to build the van with ideas he had from that experience.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Dani tours us around and through his amazing DIY Minivan build that he lives in full time. He spent many hours on this passion project with the idea that the build process should be fun. This van has a full electrical system, a bed and unique storage systems.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings

She used creativity and kept her expenses low while still providing the amenities that she needed.

It's built out with a battery bank to a large 700AH system of Battle born lithium batteries, 360w of solar, a 12 volt air conditioner that can run off-grid on their battery system, and a Latte machine cupboard that slides out.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Sarah and her cat Bodhi have lived in a van for the past two years in western Canada. She gives us a full tour of her classic camper van. Sarah also shares her personal experience about what Vanlife is like for her and why she chose the van that she did.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Electrician builds out a 4x4 sprinter into a modern camper that they are able to both live in and work mobile. This build is done with aluminum and pvc boards, has solar, a composting toilet and everything they need to live comfortably. They also share insights from life on the road.

programme.desc: The Super Pets are on World Aircraft to help Jett give some kids a tour. After Storm demonstrates how the package printer works, two packages get mixed up. programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: The Super Pets encounter mermaid students learning to befriend fish in Cebu, Philippines. Jett and Jerome deliver a microphone and speaker to a girl who wants to sing with them. programme.desc: Storm and Stella search for Jett and Donnie after the two Super Wings disappear in thin air. Astra locates their whereabouts - they're in Paris, 1889! programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.desc: Jett and Tino retrieve a mood lamp from mammoths after a Stone Age detour, delivering it to LA. In Cairo, Jett and Sally restore order after Golden Girl's magic animates the Sphinx.

programme.desc: On the Lunar base, Super Wings help Kajsa’s tulips bloom despite a meteor shower. On Check-Up Day, Jett's booster fails, but Storm's Battery Boosting Bases restore power.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the Art In The Park Show, but she isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre. While there, they learn about France. And Emma learns how to paint by following her heart!

programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend, Marisa who is visiting relatives in India. Barney takes her and the other kids on a trip to the magic caboose to visit pretend countries like Egypt, Tahiti, and India. When they were in a pretend country of India, they saw a real elephant and in the end, Melanie gets a email from her friend in India (who has also seen a real elephant in India!). BJ wants to be a great magician, but he doesn't want to spend any time practicing. He convinces Baby Bop to help him do a trick, and makes her disappear. When BJ thought she is gone forever, he realizes the importance of practice. Luckily, Baby Bop hasn't disappeared after all!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are decorating the caboose for Christmas when Barney decides to plan a Secret Santa game. Everyone has to buy or make a gift for the friend whose name they have drawn. Melanie misses the mailman, so Barney takes her to Santa's workshop at the North Pole to deliver her wish list in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, she wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel. First, they all make cardboard cars out of some scrap boxes. Next, everyone pretends to be an airplane. Then Barney turns the cardboard airplanes into a great big cardboard bus. They go on a camera safari only to discover the last mode of their transportation--a big cardboard cruise ship.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After noticing parts of the moon are missing in the night sky, Baby Bop is determined to find the rest of it. It's up to Barney and the kids to help Baby Bop take a trip to outer space where they meet Mr. Moon. Baby Bop then learns that the moon is not always full at night.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Daniel fails miserably when he tries to join the others in jump rope. Convinced that he's too little to do anything right, Barney tells him the story of The Sword in the Sandbox. Through the legend of King Arthur, Daniel learns there are many things he can do... if he tries hard enough.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesnt think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try, by recounting the tale of his great-great-grandfather Riffle the Wild West hero!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate to Grace's food drive - put on a movie premiere in the caboose! Barney and friends pitch in to help, but they all have different ideas about what kind of movie to make. Everything they try falls apart. It's curtains for Melanie's movie until she comes up with a blockbuster idea of her own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Detective BJ is on the case when several sports balls suddenly disappear. Determined to find the mysterious ball thief, BJ falsely accuses Riff of being the thief. BJ learns he cannot jump to conclusions and must find the whole story to see who the thief really is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Celebrating her birthday in the park with friends, Layla is more interested in hot dogs than her mother's Middle Eastern food. programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Captain Pickles and Wonder Princess both wanted to be the super-est superheroes. When Captain Pickles said he could jump over the moon, everyone wanted to see. BJ knew he couldn't really jump that high, but he could jump high enough to save Emma's balloon. Everyone was proud of him, even if he couldn't jump over the moon. BJ was a hero.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney comes up with the idea to have a sports day in the park. All day, they play games like soccer and hopscotch among others, all for fun. In the end, Baby Bop and Jill win the trophy for hopscotch and she and her mother leave.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
